examples: The third and most important is what happens to custo Brasil.
That is an important and sometimes underrated discount on custo Brasil.
And that is only a small part of the burden that businessmen refer to despairingly as custo Brasil (the cost of Brazil).
You can use the pay phones in the Vineyard Haven terminal to call Sao Paulo, Brasil.
Por ejemplo en el reciente viaje de la secretaria de Estado Condoleezza Rice a Brasil.
